document_info.title: Software Requirement Specification for PFSP AI Configuration Copilot (Module v2.0)
document_info.author: Jo SeungHyeon (CoolFam)
document_info.scope_limit: This SRS defines the AI Module that transforms requirements into PFSP JSON. It focuses on the intelligence, validation, and traceability layers of the transformation process.

1_system_vision_and_goal.vision: A reliable AI agent that understands automotive software standards to automate PFSP configuration.

kpis.operational_efficiency: 25% reduction in manual configuration time per component.

2.1_intelligence_and_extraction.REQ-EXT-101: The module shall extract core component parameters: ServiceName, ID, Class, Frequency, and PlayType (Repeat/OneShot).
2.1_intelligence_and_extraction.REQ-EXT-102: The module shall interpret detailed Error Handling logic: ErrorTypes (NullPointer, etc.), DebouncingCriteria (Time/Count), and ReactionModes/States.
2.1_intelligence_and_extraction.REQ-EXT-103: The module shall perform 'Standard-Aware RAG' by referencing AUTOSAR and ISO 26262 knowledge to suggest/validate safety-critical parameters.

2.2_mapping_and_conversion.REQ-MAP-201: The module shall generate Smart Converter mapping (External-to-Internal) including Scaling, Offsets, and Pre/Post-run logic tags.

2.3_validation_and_healing.REQ-VAL-301: The module shall enforce strict Pydantic v2 schema validation for all generated JSON objects.
2.3_validation_and_healing.REQ-VAL-302: The module shall implement a 'Self-Correction Loop' where Pydantic validation errors are fed back to the LLM to trigger automatic parameter adjustment.

2.4_traceability_and_trust.REQ-TRC-401: The module shall provide 'Field-Level Traceability' by embedding a `source_ref` or `traceability_id` into each JSON field, mapping it back to the specific input sentence or table row.

2.5_processing_strategy_two_phased.REQ-PRO-501: Phase 1 (Reasoning Phase): The module shall first perform free-form reasoning (Chain-of-Thought) to analyze complex automotive requirements and logic before attempting data extraction.
2.5_processing_strategy_two_phased.REQ-PRO-502: Phase 2 (Extraction Phase): The module shall use the analysis from Phase 1 as context to populate a Pydantic-based structured schema, ensuring maximum reasoning depth and structural accuracy.
2.5_processing_strategy_two_phased.REQ-PRO-503: Separation of Concerns: The system shall maintain a clear separation between the 'Intelligence Layer' (Reasoning) and the 'Format Layer' (Extraction) to prevent performance degradation caused by rigid output constraints during deep reasoning.

4_out_of_scope_limitations.EXCL-01: Direct C++ code compilation and build processes.
4_out_of_scope_limitations.EXCL-02: Real-time hardware deployment or HIL/SIL execution.
